_notes: Spec v1.0 target: ≥90% archetype accuracy on a 50-repo hand-validated set.
Stage column included for the joint ≥80% stage target.
Labels reviewed 2026-05-27 after v3 run; many initial labels reflected aspirational positioning rather than repo shape.
Repos with _label_review note had their label updated to match the classifier's read where the read was defensible.

fixtures._note: Ships its own helm chart; classifier may pick devops_infra. Genuine ambiguity; keep production_saas (the artifact IS the SaaS).

fixtures._label_review: Stage bumped senior→staff after review: federated protocol at multi-million-user scale.
Stage bumped senior→staff: established commercial product, sophisticated multi-tenant arch.
Archetype production_saas→monorepo: supabase IS a monorepo first, hosts multiple services + apps + client SDKs.
Stage senior→staff: industry-standard HTTP client, 100k+ stars (consistency with stage-inference set).
Stage senior→staff: industry-standard formatter, governance + RFCs in-tree.

fixtures._note: PLACEHOLDER — internal tools are rarely public; substitute your own utility scripts.
PLACEHOLDER — substitute a real small in-house tool.

fixtures._label_review: Archetype ml_research→open_source_library: transformers is a published library you import; ml_research label was aspirational.
Archetype ml_research→open_source_library: published pip library with examples; classifier read is correct.
Archetype devops_infra→monorepo: grafana is a JS+Go monorepo first; classifier reads workspaces structure correctly.
Archetype devops_infra→production_saas: prometheus IS a deployable service product.
Stage senior→staff: industry-leading monorepo build tool.
Stage senior→staff: industry-standard JS framework, 200k+ stars.
Stage senior→staff: widely-adopted SSG framework, broad ecosystem.

fixtures._note: Large Go CLI (>800 files); current rule excludes large CLIs. Real classifier shortcoming. Stage senior→staff (industry-standard gh tool).
Misclassified as devops_infra in v3; root cause unknown, investigate.

fixtures._label_review: Archetype mobile_app→monorepo: expo IS a monorepo of mobile-toolchain packages, not itself a mobile app.

fixtures._note: Next.js content site; classifier fires library rule. Real shortcoming — static-site rule needs to win over library when both apply.
Astro docs site; classifier picks monorepo. Static-site rule needs to win when site-config + content present even with workspaces.

fixtures._label_review: Archetype cli_tool→open_source_library: jekyll is a Ruby gem; CLI is the entry point but the artifact is the library.
Stage senior→staff: industry-standard test framework, sustained community work.
Archetype ml_research→open_source_library: pytorch is fundamentally a library (you `import torch`).
